# top_transcripts_data.csv

## Description
Core dataset with aggregated LLM query results for top-scoring transcripts, containing only numeric variables for statistical analysis.

## Generated by
`src/post_query/analysis/top_transcript_data.py`

## Variables

### transcriptid
Unique identifier for each transcript from Capital IQ database

### original_score
LLM collusion score from the first query (0-100 scale)

### mean_score_ten_repeats
Mean LLM collusion score across first 11 queries (original + 10 repeats), NA if fewer than 11 queries available

### mean_score_all_repeats
Mean LLM collusion score across all available queries for the transcript

### mean_follow_up_score
Mean follow-up analysis score from secondary LLM queries, NA if no follow-up queries available

### n_queries
Total number of LLM queries performed for this transcript

### n_follow_up_queries
Number of follow-up analysis queries performed for this transcript
